geographic_scope: Pentagon building occupants in renovated Wedge 1 and remaining Wedge 2 space exposed by the 9:37 a.m. impact; Flight 77 occupants excluded
theater_description: This is the only 9/11 site with official military and civilian deaths inside the same attacked site, so it is the only serious baseline DR candidate.
geometry_method_note: Affected-wedge occupancy is used as the bounded exposure reference; no whole-Pentagon or federal-workforce denominator is used.
military_area_note: Military deaths are explicit, but no military-only exposed-population count was located for the affected wedges.
civilian_area_note: Civilian building deaths are explicit, but no civilian-only exposed-population count was located for the affected wedges.
split_reason: The building cohort and Flight 77 manifest have different denominator structures and are kept separate.
quality_note: Numerators are strong; the denominator is bounded spatially but not status-split, so DR remains unpublished.

episode_name: World Trade Center tower occupant subgroup episode
geographic_scope: WTC 1 and WTC 2 occupants present at 8:46:30 a.m.; excludes other WTC buildings, aircraft occupants, responders, and broader city populations
theater_description: Bounded to the two towers because occupancy and collapse timing are site-specific and well documented by NIST.
geometry_method_note: No citywide, regional, or labor-force denominator is used.
military_area_note: No meaningful military-exposed tower cohort was identified, so no baseline DR is forced.
civilian_area_note: The main publishable outputs are women/adult-male civilian subgroup proxies and a source-grounded zero for child deaths.
split_reason: This site is treated primarily as a civilian subgroup RR/disproportionality episode, not a military-vs-civilian DR anchor.
quality_note: Occupancy denominators are strong, but women death inputs come from a broader WTC worker-fatality cohort and child exposure is unreported.

episode_name: American Airlines Flight 77 innocent manifest cohort
geographic_scope: American Airlines Flight 77 from hijack onset to impact; hijackers excluded
theater_description: Tiny manifest-bounded episode with complete fatality, suitable for subgroup shares but not for broader DR interpretation.
geometry_method_note: Manifest cohort only; no Pentagon-building denominator is mixed into this episode.
military_area_note: Not treated as a military episode.
civilian_area_note: All subgroup metrics are confined to innocent passengers and crew on the aircraft.
split_reason: The aircraft manifest is a fixed exposed population and should not be merged with Pentagon building occupants.
quality_note: Total manifest is strong; subgroup coding is careful but partly manual because a direct official age-sex tabulation was not found.

episode_name: United Airlines Flight 93 innocent manifest cohort
geographic_scope: United Airlines Flight 93 from hijack onset to crash; hijackers excluded
theater_description: Tiny manifest-bounded episode with complete fatality and an official youngest-victim age establishing zero children aboard.
geometry_method_note: Manifest cohort only; no public or regional denominator is used.
military_area_note: Not treated as a military episode.
civilian_area_note: All subgroup metrics are confined to innocent passengers and crew on the aircraft.
split_reason: The Flight 93 manifest is analytically distinct from all building cohorts.
quality_note: Manifest totals and child zero are strong; sex counts are still manual derivatives from the official roster.
